case_title: STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, L.P. VS. ASR TRADING, INC. et al

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Set Default Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Joseph Schieffer, Esq. for the plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P.
Plaintiff's Witness Richard Forster was placed under oath and testifies.
Default of Defendant ASR Trading, Inc. has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $56,395.35
Attorney's Fees - $8,516.64
Costs - $499.50.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
